nasb.text: But, that I may not weary you any further, I beg you to grant us, by your kindness, a brief hearing.

esv.text: But, to detain you no further, I beg you in your kindness to hear us briefly.

cnv.text: 現在我不想多煩擾你，只求你寬容一下，聽我們講幾句話。

ccb.text: 我不敢耽误大人太久，只求大人容我们简单叙述。

csbs.text: 但为了不过多地烦扰您，我恳求您，以您的仁慈听我们简短地说。
